evidence: incident_a: p99 latency increased to 340ms (2.8x baseline) at 14:08:44, critical failure at 14:11:10 (6.4 min lead time)
Latency degradation visible 6+ minutes before critical failure in incident_a

recommended_alert.title: API Gateway Latency Degradation - Potential Database Issue
recommended_alert.condition: p99 latency > 2.0x baseline for 3 consecutive minutes
recommended_alert.action: Immediately check database query performance and connection pool utilization
recommended_alert.escalation: Page on-call if exceeds 2.5x baseline or persists > 5 minutes

predictive_signals.business_impact_prevented: 6+ minutes advance warning before complete service outage

evidence: incident_a: slow query detected at 14:09:01 (2100ms), critical failure at 14:11:10 (2.15 min lead time)
incident_a: multiple slow queries at 14:09:15 (3400ms), critical failure at 14:11:10 (1.92 min lead time)
incident_b: slow query detected at 09:44:22 (1800ms), critical failure at 09:45:40 (1.3 min lead time)

recommended_alert.title: Slow Database Query Detected - Potential Full Table Scan
recommended_alert.condition: Query duration > 1500ms OR multiple queries > 1000ms within 2 minutes
recommended_alert.action: Immediately investigate query execution plan, check for missing indexes, identify query source (batch job vs application)
recommended_alert.escalation: Auto-escalate if query duration > 3000ms or if multiple slow queries detected

predictive_signals.business_impact_prevented: 1-2 minutes advance warning before connection pool exhaustion

evidence: incident_a: pool exhausted at 14:10:33 (waiting=47), critical failure at 14:11:10 (0.62 min lead time)
incident_b: pool exhausted at 09:44:55 (waiting=39), critical failure at 09:45:40 (0.75 min lead time)

recommended_alert.title: Database Connection Pool Near Exhaustion - Imminent Outage Risk
recommended_alert.condition: Connection pool utilization > 70% OR any waiting connections detected
recommended_alert.action: IMMEDIATE: Identify and kill long-running queries, check for batch jobs, prepare for service degradation
recommended_alert.escalation: Immediate page to on-call SRE and DBA, auto-trigger incident response

predictive_signals.business_impact_prevented: 1-2 minutes to prevent complete service outage through proactive query termination

evidence: incident_a: query ran for 731 seconds total, killed at 14:22:08, first impact at ~14:09:00 (~13 min of runtime before visible impact)
incident_b: query ran for 748 seconds total, killed at 09:57:14, first impact at ~09:44:22 (~13 min of runtime before visible impact)

recommended_alert.title: Long-Running Database Query - Potential Resource Exhaustion Risk
recommended_alert.action: Investigate query execution plan, check for full table scans, identify query source and business justification, prepare to terminate if non-critical
recommended_alert.escalation: Auto-escalate at 120 seconds with recommendation to kill query if not business-critical

predictive_signals.business_impact_prevented: 10+ minutes advance warning before connection pool exhaustion and service impact

predictive_signals.warning_threshold: Any full table scan on tables > 100K rows
predictive_signals.critical_threshold: Full table scan on tables > 1M rows OR during peak hours
evidence: incident_a: full table scan on user_positions table caused 731-second query
incident_b: full table scan on open_orders table caused 748-second query
Both incidents: full table scans started at batch job initiation (14:00 UTC and 09:30 UTC), visible impact 9-14 minutes later

recommended_alert.title: Full Table Scan Detected on Large Table - High Outage Risk
recommended_alert.condition: Query execution plan shows full table scan on table with > 100K rows
recommended_alert.action: IMMEDIATE: Evaluate query necessity, check for missing indexes, consider killing query if non-critical, block similar queries
recommended_alert.escalation: Immediate notification to DBA team and query owner, auto-escalate if table > 1M rows

predictive_signals.business_impact_prevented: 15+ minutes advance warning before resource exhaustion, allows time for proactive query termination

predictive_signals.signal_name: Batch Job Execution During Peak Hours
predictive_signals.baseline: Batch jobs scheduled during off-peak hours (00:00-06:00 UTC)
predictive_signals.warning_threshold: Batch job starting during operational hours (06:00-22:00 UTC)
predictive_signals.critical_threshold: Resource-intensive batch job starting during peak hours (08:00-16:00 UTC)
evidence: incident_a: user_positions_recalc batch job scheduled at 14:00 UTC (peak trading hours)
incident_b: open_orders_settlement batch job scheduled at 09:30 UTC (business hours)
Both incidents: batch jobs initiated 9-14 minutes before critical service impact

recommended_alert.title: Resource-Intensive Batch Job Starting During Peak Hours
recommended_alert.condition: Batch job with historical runtime > 5 minutes OR database-intensive job starting between 08:00-16:00 UTC
recommended_alert.action: Monitor database connection pool and query performance closely, prepare to terminate if service degradation detected, review job scheduling
recommended_alert.escalation: Notify on-call SRE team for awareness and monitoring

predictive_signals.business_impact_prevented: 10+ minutes advance warning, allows proactive monitoring and intervention before service impact

evidence: incident_a: rapid connection pool exhaustion from normal to 100/100 with 47 waiting within ~2 minutes
incident_b: rapid connection pool exhaustion from normal to 100/100 with 39 waiting within ~1 minute
Both incidents show rapid acceleration pattern before exhaustion

recommended_alert.title: Abnormal Database Connection Pool Growth - Potential Query Issue
recommended_alert.action: Immediately identify source of connection growth, check for long-running queries or connection leaks, prepare for pool exhaustion
recommended_alert.escalation: Auto-escalate if growth rate > 20 connections/minute or pool utilization > 80%

predictive_signals.business_impact_prevented: 2-3 minutes advance warning before complete pool exhaustion

evidence: incident_a: p99 latency increased from 120ms to 340ms (183% increase) between 14:02:11 and 14:08:44 (6.5 minutes)
Gradual degradation pattern visible before critical failure

recommended_alert.title: Service Response Time Degrading Rapidly - Investigate Upstream Dependencies
recommended_alert.action: Check database performance, connection pools, downstream service health, identify degradation source
recommended_alert.escalation: Escalate if degradation continues or exceeds 100% increase

predictive_signals.business_impact_prevented: 5+ minutes advance warning before service timeout and circuit breaker activation

predictive_signals.signal_name: Missing Index Detection on Query Execution
predictive_signals.warning_threshold: Query without index usage on table > 10K rows
predictive_signals.critical_threshold: Query without index usage on table > 100K rows
evidence: incident_a: missing composite index on user_positions(user_id, position_date) caused full table scan
incident_b: missing composite index on open_orders(account_id, order_date) caused full table scan
Both incidents: missing indexes detectable from first query execution

recommended_alert.title: Query Executing Without Index on Large Table - High Risk
recommended_alert.condition: Query execution plan shows no index usage on table with > 10K rows
recommended_alert.action: IMMEDIATE: Evaluate query, check if index exists, consider killing query if table > 100K rows, create missing index
recommended_alert.escalation: Immediate notification to DBA team, auto-escalate if table > 100K rows or query duration > 30 seconds

predictive_signals.business_impact_prevented: 15+ minutes advance warning, allows time to create index or terminate query before service impact

evidence: incident_a: circuit breaker opened at 14:11:02, indicating service already failed
incident_b: circuit breaker opened at 09:45:28, indicating service already failed
Circuit breaker is reactive, not predictive - included for completeness

recommended_alert.title: Circuit Breaker Opened - Service Failure Detected
recommended_alert.condition: Circuit breaker state changes to OPEN
recommended_alert.action: Service has failed - investigate root cause immediately, check upstream dependencies, database health, connection pools
recommended_alert.escalation: Immediate page to on-call, trigger incident response

predictive_signals.business_impact_prevented: None - this is a reactive signal indicating failure has occurred, but critical for incident detection

composite_signals.detection_logic: IF (long_running_query > 60s AND full_table_scan_detected) OR (connection_pool_utilization > 70% AND slow_queries_detected)
evidence: Both incidents showed this exact cascade: full table scan → long-running query → connection pool exhaustion → service failure
Pattern repeatable across incident_a, incident_b, and historical INC-2024-007

recommended_alert.title: DATABASE RESOURCE EXHAUSTION CASCADE DETECTED - IMMINENT OUTAGE
recommended_alert.condition: Multiple database stress signals detected simultaneously
recommended_alert.action: IMMEDIATE ACTION REQUIRED: Identify and kill long-running queries, check batch jobs, prepare for service degradation, notify incident commander
recommended_alert.escalation: Immediate page to on-call SRE and DBA, auto-trigger P1 incident, notify engineering leadership

composite_signals.business_impact_prevented: 8+ minutes advance warning before complete service outage, high confidence prediction of imminent failure

evidence: Both incidents triggered by batch jobs during operational hours performing full table scans
Pattern: batch job start → full table scan → long-running query → service impact after 9-14 minutes

recommended_alert.title: High-Risk Batch Job Pattern Detected - Monitor Closely
recommended_alert.condition: Batch job running during peak hours with poor query performance characteristics
recommended_alert.action: Monitor database connection pool and service latency closely, prepare to terminate batch job if service degradation detected, review job scheduling and query optimization
recommended_alert.escalation: Escalate to CRITICAL if connection pool utilization > 70% or service latency degrades > 2x baseline

composite_signals.business_impact_prevented: 12+ minutes advance warning, allows time to terminate batch job before service impact

evidence: incident_a showed latency degradation (14:08:44) → slow queries (14:09:01) → connection pool exhaustion (14:10:33) → failure (14:11:10)
Clear acceleration pattern visible across multiple metrics

recommended_alert.title: Service Degradation Accelerating - Outage Imminent
recommended_alert.condition: Multiple service health metrics degrading simultaneously
recommended_alert.action: IMMEDIATE: Identify root cause (likely database), check for long-running queries or batch jobs, prepare for service failure, consider proactive circuit breaker activation
recommended_alert.escalation: Immediate page to on-call, prepare incident response team

composite_signals.business_impact_prevented: 4+ minutes advance warning before complete service failure

alert_configuration_recommendations.rationale: These signals have very high confidence, low false positive rates, and directly predict imminent outages with sufficient lead time for intervention
alert_configuration_recommendations.implementation: Implement immediately with auto-escalation and incident trigger

alert_configuration_recommendations.rationale: Strong predictive signals with good lead time, may require human judgment but indicate high risk
alert_configuration_recommendations.implementation: Implement with on-call notification and monitoring dashboard

alert_configuration_recommendations.rationale: Early warning signals with longer lead times, useful for proactive investigation
alert_configuration_recommendations.implementation: Implement with dashboard alerts and optional notifications

alert_configuration_recommendations.rationale: Reactive signal for incident detection, not predictive
alert_configuration_recommendations.implementation: Already implemented via circuit breaker, ensure proper alerting integration

real_time_monitoring: Continuous query execution plan analysis to detect full table scans before they cause impact
Active query duration monitoring with automatic alerts at 60s and 120s thresholds
Connection pool utilization monitoring with 1-minute granularity and growth rate calculation
Service latency monitoring with baseline comparison and degradation velocity calculation
proactive_analysis: Daily batch job schedule review against peak operational hours
Weekly database index coverage analysis to identify missing indexes before deployment
Query performance testing in staging environment with production-scale data
Database resource capacity planning based on batch job schedules and growth projections
automated_remediation: Automatic query termination for queries exceeding 300 seconds without business justification
Automatic batch job suspension if connection pool utilization exceeds 80%
Automatic circuit breaker activation if composite signal CS-001 detected
Automatic index recommendation generation for queries showing full table scans
preventive_monitoring_strategy.estimated_mttr_improvement: From 13-16 minutes to 3-5 minutes with proactive signal detection and automated remediation
preventive_monitoring_strategy.estimated_incident_prevention: 80-90% of similar incidents preventable through early detection and intervention based on PS-004, PS-005, and CS-001 signals
